full_text:
Cui Lin (Deru) 崔林 (德儒)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cui Lin (崔林), styledDeru (德儒), was born in Qinghe. Cui Yan’s younger cousin, discussed the scholars of Ji province with Chen Qun. Cui Lin was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cui Lin lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
